mfa.label: MFA
mfa.description: Enable MFA setup and challenge surfaces for session authentication.

module.framework.apiplatform.label: API Platform module
module.framework.apiplatform.description: Load the versioned API admin and bearer-token runtime surfaces.

module.framework.audit.label: Audit module
module.framework.audit.description: Load audit trails and operational evidence surfaces.

module.framework.automation.label: Automation module
module.framework.automation.description: Load internal automation rules, logs and workflow triggers.

module.framework.devtools.label: DevTools module
module.framework.devtools.description: Load technical smoke and module designer surfaces.

module.framework.documents.label: Documents module
module.framework.documents.description: Load document templates, preview and export surfaces.

module.framework.media.label: Media module
module.framework.media.description: Load reusable media library and metadata field surfaces.

module.framework.notification.label: Notification module
module.framework.notification.description: Load authenticated notification APIs and websocket token issuance.

module.framework.operations.label: Operations module
module.framework.operations.description: Load platform operations surfaces for flags, plugins, deployment and tenancy.

notifications.label: Notifications
notifications.description: Enable authenticated notification endpoints and unread counters.

social_auth.label: Social auth
social_auth.description: Enable OAuth entry and callback routes when providers are configured.
